docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM APR-10-1996 TO APR-15-1996 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C
PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION FILED BY DEFTS ATTORNEY
IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT THE JUDGMENT ENTERED IN THIS CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT MILTON CHEW IS HEREBY VACATED AND IT SHALL BE NULL AND VOID.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-15-1996, GRANTED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT WILL NOT BE HEARD AT 8:30AM, BUT AT 10:30AM, APRIL 10, 1996 AS SHOWN ON DOCUMENTS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHEW, MILTON
JUDGMENT STAYED. DEFT TO RETURN PROPERTY TO PLFT. BY 12/21/95. PLFT TO PICK UP PROPERTY AT HIS OWN EXPENSE. IF THIS IS DONE PRIOR 12/21/95 JUDGMENT
WILL BE STAYED. PLFT IS TO NOTIFY COURT OF THE PROGRESS OF THIS ORDER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GILPIN, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEW, MILTON $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,040.00, THIS JUDGMENT IS STAYED, DEFT IS TO RETURN PROPERT TO PLFT BY 12/21/95. PLFT IS TO PICK UP PROPERTY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GILPIN, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT CHEW, MILTON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-1995 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT C
AT HIS OWN EXPENSE. IF THIS IS DONE PRIOR TO 12/21/95 JUDGMENT WILL BE STAYED. PLFT IS TO NOTIFY COURT OF THIS ORDER.
MOTION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHEW, MILTON HEARING SET FOR APR-10-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
